On.name: On
On.description: Sets all pixels to a solid color at a given intensity
On.intent: Basic building block for solid color blocks, used everywhere as the most common effect

parameters.name: On_Transparency
parameters.description: Transparency of the solid color (0=opaque, 100=invisible)

parameters.name: On_Cycles
parameters.description: Number of palette color cycles during the effect duration

parameters.name: On_Shimmer
parameters.description: Enable shimmer (rapid on/off) on the solid color

parameters.name: Eff_On_Start
parameters.description: Starting brightness level (0-255)

parameters.name: Eff_On_End
parameters.description: Ending brightness level (0-255, enables fade in/out when different from start)

analysis_mappings.description: Higher energy = lower transparency (more visible) for intensity-driven blocks

Off.name: Off
Off.intent: Used for blank gaps, transitions, and blackout moments

parameters.name: Off_Transparent
parameters.description: Make the off effect transparent instead of black (allows layers below to show)

parameters.name: Off_Transparency
parameters.description: Transparency level when transparent mode is enabled

parameters.name: Off_FadeOut
parameters.description: Fade to off over the effect duration instead of instant blackout

parameters.name: Off_Style
parameters.description: What to show when effect is off (black or pass-through background)

Color Wash.name: Color Wash
Color Wash.description: Washes palette colors across the model with configurable direction and speed
Color Wash.intent: Smooth ambient color transitions for verses, intros, and low-energy sections

parameters.name: ColorWash_Count
parameters.description: Number of color bands visible simultaneously

parameters.name: ColorWash_Cycles
parameters.description: Number of complete color wash cycles

parameters.name: ColorWash_HFade
parameters.description: Apply horizontal fade across the model

parameters.name: ColorWash_VFade
parameters.description: Apply vertical fade across the model

parameters.name: ColorWash_Shimmer
parameters.description: Enable shimmer overlay on the color wash

parameters.name: ColorWash_CircularPalette
parameters.description: Wrap palette colors circularly (seamless loop between last and first color)

parameters.name: ColorWash_ReverseFades
parameters.description: Reverse the direction of horizontal/vertical fades

analysis_mappings.description: Faster BPM = more wash cycles for rhythmic color movement
Higher energy = more color bands for visual density

Fill.name: Fill
Fill.description: Fills the model with color from a configurable position and direction
Fill.intent: Build-up and reveal effects, great for crescendos and transitions

parameters.name: Fill_Position
parameters.description: Fill position as percentage (0=empty, 100=full)

parameters.name: Fill_Band_Size
parameters.description: Size of the color band (0=solid fill)

parameters.name: Fill_Offset
parameters.description: Offset of the fill starting position

parameters.name: Fill_Direction
parameters.description: Direction of the fill movement

parameters.name: Fill_Skip_Size
parameters.description: Size of gaps between fill bands (0=no gaps)

parameters.name: Fill_Color_Time
parameters.description: Cycle colors over time instead of over position

parameters.name: Fill_Wrap
parameters.description: Wrap the fill pattern around when it reaches the edge

analysis_mappings.description: Energy level directly drives fill percentage for build-up effects

Shimmer.name: Shimmer
Shimmer.description: Rapid on/off cycling of palette colors creating a shimmering effect
Shimmer.intent: Add sparkle and movement to static color blocks, good for sustained notes

parameters.name: Shimmer_Duty_Factor
parameters.description: Duty cycle percentage (higher = more on-time vs off-time)

parameters.name: Shimmer_Cycles
parameters.description: Number of shimmer on/off cycles during the effect

parameters.name: Shimmer_Use_All_Colors
parameters.description: Cycle through all palette colors instead of just the first

analysis_mappings.description: BPM drives shimmer rate for beat-synchronized flashing

Strobe.name: Strobe
Strobe.description: Sharp on/off strobe flashing at configurable speed
Strobe.intent: High-energy accents, drum hits, and climax moments

parameters.name: Strobe_Number
parameters.description: Number of strobe flashes during the effect

parameters.name: Strobe_StrobeDuration
parameters.description: Duration of each flash in milliseconds-equivalent units

parameters.name: Strobe_Type
parameters.description: Pattern of the strobe flash across the model

parameters.name: Strobe_Music
parameters.description: Trigger strobe flashes from audio level (music reactive)

analysis_mappings.description: Number of onsets drives strobe flash count
Higher energy = longer flash duration for more intensity

Twinkle.name: Twinkle
Twinkle.description: Random pixels twinkle on and off like stars
Twinkle.intent: Gentle ambient sparkle for quiet sections, intros, and night scenes

parameters.name: Twinkle_Count
parameters.description: Number of simultaneously twinkling pixels

parameters.name: Twinkle_Steps
parameters.description: Number of steps in each twinkle fade cycle

parameters.name: Twinkle_Strobe
parameters.description: Use strobe (instant on/off) instead of gradual fade

parameters.name: Twinkle_ReRandom
parameters.description: Re-randomize twinkle positions each cycle

parameters.name: Twinkle_Style
parameters.description: Rendering method for twinkle animation

analysis_mappings.description: Treble energy drives twinkle density for sparkle in bright sections

Bars.name: Bars
Bars.description: Renders horizontal or vertical color bars that move across the model
Bars.intent: Versatile pattern effect for rhythmic movement and transitions

parameters.name: Bars_BarCount
parameters.description: Number of color bars visible at once

parameters.name: Bars_Cycles
parameters.description: Number of complete bar movement cycles

parameters.name: Bars_Direction
parameters.description: Direction of bar movement

parameters.name: Bars_Highlight
parameters.description: Highlight the leading edge of moving bars

parameters.name: Bars_3D
parameters.description: Apply 3D shading to bars for depth effect

parameters.name: Bars_Gradient
parameters.description: Apply gradient coloring across bar bands

parameters.name: Bars_UseFirstColorForHighlight
parameters.description: Use the first palette color for the highlight edge instead of white

parameters.name: Bars_Center
parameters.description: Center point offset for expand/compress directions

analysis_mappings.description: Higher BPM = more bars visible for denser rhythmic patterns
Sync bar cycles to beat count for rhythmic movement

Butterfly.name: Butterfly
Butterfly.description: Mathematical butterfly curve pattern with color cycling
Butterfly.intent: Mesmerizing organic patterns for sustained musical passages

parameters.name: Butterfly_Colors
parameters.description: Color source for the butterfly pattern

parameters.name: Butterfly_Direction
parameters.description: Direction of the butterfly animation

parameters.name: Butterfly_Style
parameters.description: Mathematical style variant of the butterfly pattern (1-10)

parameters.name: Butterfly_Chunks
parameters.description: Number of pattern chunks/repetitions

parameters.name: Butterfly_Skip
parameters.description: Skip factor controlling pattern density

parameters.name: Butterfly_Speed
parameters.description: Animation speed of the butterfly pattern

analysis_mappings.description: BPM drives pattern animation speed

Circles.name: Circles
Circles.description: Animated circles that bounce, collide, or radiate across the model
Circles.intent: Playful bouncing patterns for upbeat sections

parameters.name: Circles_Count
parameters.description: Number of circles on the model

parameters.name: Circles_Size
parameters.description: Radius of each circle

parameters.name: Circles_Bounce
parameters.description: Enable bouncing behavior when circles hit edges

parameters.name: Circles_Radial
parameters.description: Use radial mode (circles radiate outward from center)

parameters.name: Circles_Collide
parameters.description: Enable collision detection between circles

parameters.name: Circles_Speed
parameters.description: Speed of circle movement/animation

parameters.name: Circles_XC
parameters.description: Horizontal center offset for radial mode

parameters.name: Circles_YC
parameters.description: Vertical center offset for radial mode

parameters.name: Circles_Plasma
parameters.description: Use plasma coloring instead of solid colors

analysis_mappings.description: More onsets spawn more circles for visual density
Bass energy drives circle size

Curtain.name: Curtain
Curtain.description: Opening/closing curtain effect that reveals or hides color
Curtain.intent: Dramatic reveals and transitions, great for song section changes

parameters.name: Curtain_Edge
parameters.description: Edge from which the curtain opens

parameters.name: Curtain_Effect
parameters.description: Curtain movement behavior

parameters.name: Curtain_Swag
parameters.description: Amount of swag (draping) in the curtain movement

parameters.name: Curtain_Speed
parameters.description: Speed multiplier for the curtain animation

parameters.name: Curtain_Repeat
parameters.description: Repeat the curtain animation in a loop

analysis_mappings.description: BPM drives curtain speed for beat-synchronized reveals

Fan.name: Fan
Fan.description: Rotating fan blade pattern with configurable arms and speed
Fan.intent: Spinning visual movement synchronized to beat, popular on trees and matrices

parameters.name: Fan_Num_Blades
parameters.description: Number of fan blades

parameters.name: Fan_Blade_Width
parameters.description: Width of each blade as percentage of sector

parameters.name: Fan_Revolutions
parameters.description: Number of complete rotations during the effect

parameters.name: Fan_Radius1
parameters.description: Inner radius of the fan blades

parameters.name: Fan_Radius2
parameters.description: Outer radius of the fan blades

parameters.name: Fan_Start_Angle
parameters.description: Starting angle of the first fan blade in degrees

parameters.name: Fan_Blade_Angle
parameters.description: Angular span of each fan blade

parameters.name: Fan_Num_Elements
parameters.description: Number of concentric elements per blade

parameters.name: Fan_Element_Width
parameters.description: Width of each element within a blade

parameters.name: Fan_Duration
parameters.description: Duration of the fan animation as percentage of effect duration

parameters.name: Fan_Accel
parameters.description: Acceleration of fan rotation (negative = decelerate)

parameters.name: Fan_CenterX
parameters.description: Horizontal center position of the fan

parameters.name: Fan_CenterY
parameters.description: Vertical center position of the fan

parameters.name: Fan_Scale
parameters.description: Scale the fan to fit the model dimensions

analysis_mappings.description: Beat count drives revolution count for beat-synchronized spinning
Higher energy = wider blades for more visual fill

Marquee.name: Marquee
Marquee.description: Chase pattern of lit pixels moving around the model perimeter
Marquee.intent: Classic chase effect for outlines, arches, and borders

parameters.name: Marquee_Band_Size
parameters.description: Number of lit pixels in each chase band

parameters.name: Marquee_Skip_Size
parameters.description: Number of dark pixels between chase bands

parameters.name: Marquee_Thickness
parameters.description: Thickness of the marquee in pixels

parameters.name: Marquee_Speed
parameters.description: Speed of the chase movement

parameters.name: Marquee_Reverse
parameters.description: Reverse the direction of chase movement

parameters.name: Marquee_Stagger
parameters.description: Stagger offset between rows/columns of the marquee

parameters.name: Marquee_Start
parameters.description: Starting position offset in the chase cycle

parameters.name: Marquee_ScaleX
parameters.description: Horizontal scale percentage of the marquee pattern

parameters.name: Marquee_ScaleY
parameters.description: Vertical scale percentage of the marquee pattern

parameters.name: Marquee_XC
parameters.description: Horizontal center offset of the marquee pattern

parameters.name: Marquee_YC
parameters.description: Vertical center offset of the marquee pattern

analysis_mappings.description: BPM drives chase speed for rhythmic movement

Pinwheel.name: Pinwheel
Pinwheel.description: Rotating pinwheel with configurable arms, twist, and speed
Pinwheel.intent: Dramatic spinning patterns for high-energy sections, heavily used in real sequences

parameters.name: Pinwheel_Arms
parameters.description: Number of pinwheel arms

parameters.name: Pinwheel_ArmSize
parameters.description: Length/size of each arm

parameters.name: Pinwheel_Twist
parameters.description: Twist angle of the pinwheel arms

parameters.name: Pinwheel_Speed
parameters.description: Rotation speed of the pinwheel

parameters.name: Pinwheel_Thickness
parameters.description: Thickness of each pinwheel arm

parameters.name: Pinwheel_3D
parameters.description: 3D shading style for the pinwheel

parameters.name: Pinwheel_Offset
parameters.description: Rotation offset angle to shift starting position

parameters.name: Pinwheel_XC
parameters.description: Horizontal center offset of the pinwheel

parameters.name: Pinwheel_YC
parameters.description: Vertical center offset of the pinwheel

analysis_mappings.description: BPM drives rotation speed for beat-synced spinning
Energy drives arm size for dynamic intensity

Plasma.name: Plasma
Plasma.description: Animated plasma-like color fields using sine wave interference
Plasma.intent: Psychedelic flowing patterns for atmospheric and ambient sections

parameters.name: Plasma_Color
parameters.description: Color palette style for the plasma

parameters.name: Plasma_Style
parameters.description: Visual style variant of the plasma pattern

parameters.name: Plasma_Line_Density
parameters.description: Density of the plasma lines/waves

parameters.name: Plasma_Speed
parameters.description: Speed of the plasma animation

analysis_mappings.description: BPM drives plasma animation speed

Ripple.name: Ripple
Ripple.description: Concentric ripples expanding outward from a center point
Ripple.intent: Impact visualization for drum hits and accents, used frequently in real sequences

parameters.name: Ripple_Object_To_Draw
parameters.description: Shape of the ripple rings

parameters.name: Ripple_Movement
parameters.description: Direction of ripple movement

parameters.name: Ripple_Draw_Style
parameters.description: Drawing style and fill mode for ripple rings (lines, solid, or highlighted)

parameters.name: Ripple_Thickness
parameters.description: Thickness of each ripple ring

parameters.name: Ripple_Cycles
parameters.description: Number of complete ripple cycles (divided by 10)

parameters.name: Ripple_Scale
parameters.description: Scale of the ripple pattern as percentage

parameters.name: Ripple_Spacing
parameters.description: Spacing between concentric ripple rings (divided by 10)

parameters.name: Ripple_Points
parameters.description: Number of polygon points (for Polygon/Star shapes)

parameters.name: Ripple_Rotation
parameters.description: Rotation angle of the ripple shape

parameters.name: Ripple_Velocity
parameters.description: Velocity of ripple center movement (divided by 10)

parameters.name: Ripple_Direction
parameters.description: Direction angle of ripple center movement

parameters.name: Ripple_XC
parameters.description: Horizontal center offset of the ripple origin

parameters.name: Ripple_YC
parameters.description: Vertical center offset of the ripple origin

parameters.name: Ripple_Outline
parameters.description: Outline thickness for ring shapes (divided by 10)

parameters.name: Ripple_Twist
parameters.description: Twist applied to ripple rings as they expand (divided by 10)

parameters.name: Ripple_3D
parameters.description: Enable 3D depth shading on ripples

analysis_mappings.description: Onset count drives ripple cycles for impact visualization
Drum impacts trigger new ripple origin points

Shape.name: Shape
Shape.description: Renders geometric shapes (circles, stars, hearts, etc.) with animation
Shape.intent: Decorative shape overlays, popular for themed sequences

parameters.name: Shape_ObjectToDraw
parameters.description: Shape to draw

parameters.name: Shape_Count
parameters.description: Number of shapes to display simultaneously

parameters.name: Shape_Thickness
parameters.description: Line thickness of the shape outlines

parameters.name: Shape_Growth
parameters.description: Growth speed of shapes (0=static)

parameters.name: Shape_Lifetime
parameters.description: Lifetime of each shape before it fades

parameters.name: Shape_StartSize
parameters.description: Initial size of spawned shapes

parameters.name: Shape_Rotation
parameters.description: Rotation angle of the shapes

parameters.name: Shape_CentreX
parameters.description: Horizontal center position for shape spawning

parameters.name: Shape_CentreY
parameters.description: Vertical center position for shape spawning

parameters.name: Shape_UseMusic
parameters.description: Trigger shape spawns from audio level (music reactive)

analysis_mappings.description: Onset density drives shape count
Energy level drives shape growth rate

Shockwave.name: Shockwave
Shockwave.description: Expanding shockwave ring from center — the #2 most-used effect in real sequences
Shockwave.intent: Beat-sync staple for drum hits and musical impacts, extremely popular

parameters.name: Shockwave_CenterX
parameters.description: Horizontal center position of the shockwave

parameters.name: Shockwave_CenterY
parameters.description: Vertical center position of the shockwave

parameters.name: Shockwave_Start_Radius
parameters.description: Starting radius of the expanding ring

parameters.name: Shockwave_End_Radius
parameters.description: Ending radius of the expanding ring

parameters.name: Shockwave_Start_Width
parameters.description: Starting line width of the ring

parameters.name: Shockwave_End_Width
parameters.description: Ending line width of the ring as it expands

parameters.name: Shockwave_Accel
parameters.description: Acceleration of the shockwave expansion (negative = decelerate)

parameters.name: Shockwave_Blend_Edges
parameters.description: Blend/antialias the edges of the shockwave ring

parameters.name: Shockwave_Scale
parameters.description: Scale the shockwave to fit the model dimensions

parameters.name: Shockwave_Cycles
parameters.description: Number of shockwave expansion cycles during the effect

analysis_mappings.description: Bass energy drives shockwave expansion size
Drum impacts trigger thick shockwave rings
Energy level drives expansion acceleration

Spirals.name: Spirals
Spirals.description: Spiraling color bands that rotate around the model, heavily used with value curves
Spirals.intent: Dynamic spinning patterns for energetic sections, 4th most-used effect

parameters.name: Spirals_Count
parameters.description: Number of spiral arms

parameters.name: Spirals_Rotation
parameters.description: Rotation speed and direction of the spirals

parameters.name: Spirals_Thickness
parameters.description: Thickness of each spiral band as percentage

parameters.name: Spirals_Direction
parameters.description: Vertical movement direction of the spirals

parameters.name: Spirals_3D
parameters.description: Apply 3D shading to spiral bands

parameters.name: Spirals_Blend
parameters.description: Blend colors between spiral bands

parameters.name: Spirals_Grow
parameters.description: Spiral bands grow outward over time

parameters.name: Spirals_Shrink
parameters.description: Spiral bands shrink inward over time

parameters.name: Spirals_Movement
parameters.description: Vertical movement speed of the spirals (divided by 10 for float, negative = down)

analysis_mappings.description: BPM drives rotation speed for beat-synced spinning
Energy drives spiral thickness for visual intensity

Wave.name: Wave
Wave.description: Sinusoidal wave pattern moving across the model
Wave.intent: Smooth flowing patterns for melodic passages and transitions

parameters.name: Wave_Type
parameters.description: Mathematical function for the wave shape

parameters.name: Wave_FillColor
parameters.description: Fill color beneath the wave

parameters.name: Wave_Number
parameters.description: Number of simultaneous waves

parameters.name: Wave_Thickness
parameters.description: Thickness of the wave line

parameters.name: Wave_Speed
parameters.description: Speed of wave movement

parameters.name: Wave_Direction
parameters.description: Horizontal direction of wave movement

parameters.name: Wave_YOffset
parameters.description: Vertical offset of the wave centerline

parameters.name: Wave_Height
parameters.description: Height/amplitude of the wave

parameters.name: Mirror_Wave
parameters.description: Mirror the wave pattern vertically for symmetric effect

analysis_mappings.description: BPM drives wave speed for rhythmic flow
Mid energy drives wave position for melodic tracking

Fire.name: Fire
Fire.description: Simulates rising flame animation with heat mapping
Fire.intent: Use for aggressive, high-energy sections -- hot colors rising from bottom

parameters.name: Fire_Height
parameters.description: Height of the flames as percentage of model height

parameters.name: Fire_HueShift
parameters.description: Shifts the color hue of the flames

parameters.name: Fire_GrowthCycles
parameters.description: Number of grow/shrink cycles during the effect

parameters.name: Fire_GrowWithMusic
parameters.description: Enable music-reactive fire height (responds to audio levels)

parameters.name: Fire_Location
parameters.description: Direction from which flames originate

analysis_mappings.description: Bass energy drives flame height -- louder bass = taller flames
Enable GrowWithMusic when overall energy is above 50%

Fireworks.name: Fireworks
Fireworks.description: Firework bursts that explode outward from random or fixed positions
Fireworks.intent: Celebratory explosive moments for climaxes, drops, and big impacts

parameters.name: Fireworks_Count
parameters.description: Number of particles per firework burst

parameters.name: Fireworks_Velocity
parameters.description: Initial velocity of firework particles

parameters.name: Fireworks_Fade
parameters.description: Rate at which firework particles fade out

parameters.name: Fireworks_NumberExplosions
parameters.description: Number of simultaneous explosions

parameters.name: Fireworks_UseMusic
parameters.description: Trigger fireworks from audio level (music reactive)

parameters.name: Fireworks_Gravity
parameters.description: Gravity pulling particles downward

parameters.name: Fireworks_XLocation
parameters.description: Fixed horizontal spawn position (-1=random)

parameters.name: Fireworks_YLocation
parameters.description: Fixed vertical spawn position (-1=random)

parameters.name: Fireworks_XVelocity
parameters.description: Horizontal velocity bias for particle spray

parameters.name: Fireworks_YVelocity
parameters.description: Vertical velocity bias for particle spray

parameters.name: Fireworks_UseTimingTrack
parameters.description: Trigger fireworks from a timing track instead of auto-spawning

analysis_mappings.description: Drum impacts trigger firework explosions
Energy level drives particle count for bigger explosions at high energy
Bass energy drives particle velocity

Liquid.name: Liquid
Liquid.description: Fluid dynamics simulation with particles flowing like liquid
Liquid.intent: Smooth flowing visual for ambient and atmospheric sections

parameters.name: Liquid_ParticleType
parameters.description: Physics behavior type for the liquid particles

parameters.name: Liquid_Lifetime
parameters.description: Lifetime of each particle in frames

parameters.name: Liquid_Size
parameters.description: Size of the particle system

parameters.name: Liquid_Gravity
parameters.description: Gravity force applied to particles (divided by 10 for float)

parameters.name: Liquid_GravityAngle
parameters.description: Angle of gravity direction in degrees

parameters.name: Liquid_X1
parameters.description: X position of source 1

parameters.name: Liquid_Y1
parameters.description: Y position of source 1

parameters.name: Liquid_Direction1
parameters.description: Emission direction angle of source 1

parameters.name: Liquid_Velocity1
parameters.description: Emission velocity of source 1

parameters.name: Liquid_Flow1
parameters.description: Particle flow rate of source 1

parameters.name: Liquid_SourceSize1
parameters.description: Size of emission area for source 1

parameters.name: Liquid_FlowMusic1
parameters.description: Drive source 1 flow rate from audio level

parameters.name: Liquid_Enabled2
parameters.description: Enable particle source 2

parameters.name: Liquid_Enabled3
parameters.description: Enable particle source 3

parameters.name: Liquid_Enabled4
parameters.description: Enable particle source 4

parameters.name: Liquid_TopBarrier

parameters.name: Liquid_HoldColor

Meteors.name: Meteors
Meteors.description: Streaking meteor trails falling or shooting across the model
Meteors.intent: Fast movement effects for high-energy sections and falling patterns

parameters.name: Meteors_Length

parameters.name: Meteors_Effect

parameters.name: Meteors_Swirl_Intensity

Energy drives trail length for visual intensity

Snowflakes.name: Snowflakes
Snowflakes.description: Falling snowflake particles with various shapes and accumulation
Snowflakes.intent: Winter/holiday themed falling patterns, gentle ambient movement

Single Strand.name: Single Strand
Single Strand.description: The #1 most-used effect -- wraps WLED-style sub-effects (chase, comet, fireworks 1D, etc.)
Single Strand.intent: Workhorse effect for all prop types, sub-mode selection enables enormous variety

parameters.name: SingleStrand_FX
parameters.description: Sub-effect mode (wraps WLED-style presets)

parameters.name: Chase_Type1
parameters.description: Chase direction and movement pattern (applies to Color Chase and Color Sweep modes)

parameters.name: Fade_Type
parameters.description: How the chase fades at its leading/trailing edges

parameters.name: Chase_Rotations
parameters.description: Number of chase rotations (divided by 10 for float, e.g. 10 = 1.0 rotation)

parameters.name: Number_Chases
parameters.description: Number of simultaneous chases running on the strand

parameters.name: Color_Mix1
parameters.description: Color mix ratio (percentage of lit pixels in chase band)

parameters.name: Chase_Offset
parameters.description: Starting offset position of the chase (divided by 10 for float)

parameters.name: FX_Intensity
parameters.description: Intensity/brightness of the FX sub-effect (used in Fireworks 1D and other FX modes)

parameters.name: FX_Speed
parameters.description: Speed of the FX sub-effect animation

parameters.name: Skips_Direction
parameters.description: Direction of skip pattern movement (applies to Skips 2-Color and 3-Color modes)

parameters.name: Skips_BandSize
parameters.description: Size of color bands in skip modes

parameters.name: Skips_SkipSize
parameters.description: Number of pixels to skip between bands

parameters.name: Skips_StartPos
parameters.description: Starting pixel position for skip patterns

parameters.name: Skips_Advance
parameters.description: Number of pixels to advance each frame in skip modes

parameters.name: Chase_Group_All
parameters.description: Group all strands together as one for chase (treat multi-strand model as single strand)

parameters.name: SingleStrand_Colors
parameters.description: Color source for the chase pattern

parameters.name: SingleStrand_FX_Palette
parameters.description: How palette colors are applied in FX sub-mode

parameters.name: Chase_Type1
parameters.description: Chase direction pattern

analysis_mappings.description: BPM drives chase rotations for beat-synchronized movement
Energy drives color mix ratio for intensity variation
Onset density drives number of simultaneous chases

Morph.name: Morph
Morph.description: Morphs a shape from one position/size to another across the model
Morph.intent: Dramatic transitions and movement across the display

parameters.name: Morph_Start_X1
parameters.description: Starting X position of the first morph point

parameters.name: Morph_Start_Y1
parameters.description: Starting Y position of the first morph point

parameters.name: Morph_End_X1
parameters.description: Ending X position of the first morph point

parameters.name: Morph_End_Y1
parameters.description: Ending Y position of the first morph point

parameters.name: Morph_Stagger
parameters.description: Stagger amount for multi-pixel morph movement

parameters.name: Morph_Repeat_Count
parameters.description: Number of morph shape repetitions

parameters.name: Morph_Repeat_Skip
parameters.description: Spacing between repeated morph shapes

parameters.name: Morph_Start_X2
parameters.description: Starting X position of the second morph point (defines head width)

parameters.name: Morph_Start_Y2
parameters.description: Starting Y position of the second morph point (defines head height)

parameters.name: Morph_End_X2
parameters.description: Ending X position of the second morph point (defines tail width)

parameters.name: Morph_End_Y2
parameters.description: Ending Y position of the second morph point (defines tail height)

parameters.name: MorphDuration
parameters.description: Duration of the morph head as percentage of effect time

parameters.name: MorphAccel
parameters.description: Acceleration of the morph movement (negative = decelerate)

parameters.name: MorphStartLength
parameters.description: Length of the morph head at the start

parameters.name: MorphEndLength
parameters.description: Length of the morph head at the end

parameters.name: MorphUseHeadStartColor
parameters.description: Use a specific color for the morph head at the start position

parameters.name: MorphUseHeadEndColor
parameters.description: Use a specific color for the morph head at the end position

analysis_mappings.description: BPM drives stagger amount for rhythmic spreading

Warp.name: Warp
Warp.description: Warps/distorts the underlying content with various transformation modes
Warp.intent: Add dynamic distortion to existing effects for transitions and build-ups

parameters.name: Warp_Type
parameters.description: Type of warp distortion to apply

parameters.name: Warp_Treatment
parameters.description: How the warp effect progresses over time

parameters.name: Warp_Cycle_Count
parameters.description: Number of warp animation cycles

parameters.name: Warp_Speed
parameters.description: Speed of the warp animation

parameters.name: Warp_Frequency
parameters.description: Frequency of the warp distortion pattern

parameters.name: Warp_X
parameters.description: Horizontal center position of the warp effect

parameters.name: Warp_Y
parameters.description: Vertical center position of the warp effect

analysis_mappings.description: BPM drives warp animation speed
Energy drives warp distortion frequency

Music.name: Music
Music.description: Visualizes audio frequency spectrum as colored bars or lines
Music.intent: Direct audio visualization for music-reactive displays

parameters.name: Music_Bars
parameters.description: Number of frequency bars displayed

parameters.name: Music_Type
parameters.description: Visualization style for the audio bars

parameters.name: Music_Sensitivity
parameters.description: Audio level sensitivity (higher = more reactive)

parameters.name: Music_Colour
parameters.description: Map frequency to color (heat map style)

parameters.name: Music_Scale
parameters.description: Scale bars to fit model width

parameters.name: Music_ScaleNotes
parameters.description: Scale individual note bars proportionally

parameters.name: Music_Scaling
parameters.description: How frequency bars are scaled across the display

parameters.name: Music_Offset
parameters.description: Vertical offset of the music visualization

analysis_mappings.description: Overall energy drives sensitivity for consistent reactivity
Spectral complexity drives bar count for visual frequency detail

VU Meter.name: VU Meter
VU Meter.description: Audio level meter with multiple visualization styles, can reference timing tracks directly
VU Meter.intent: Direct audio-reactive visualization, references timing tracks by name for precise sync

parameters.name: VUMeter_Bars
parameters.description: Number of VU meter bars/segments

parameters.name: VUMeter_Type
parameters.description: VU meter visualization type

parameters.name: VUMeter_Sensitivity
parameters.description: Audio sensitivity threshold

parameters.name: VUMeter_TimingTrack
parameters.description: Name of the timing track to use for timing-based VU modes

parameters.name: VUMeter_Shape
parameters.description: Shape used for shape-based VU modes

parameters.name: VUMeter_Gain
parameters.description: Audio gain adjustment (positive = amplify, negative = attenuate)

parameters.name: VUMeter_YOffset
parameters.description: Vertical offset of the VU meter display

analysis_mappings.description: Energy drives VU meter sensitivity for consistent audio response
Analysis timing track name maps directly to VU Meter timing track reference

Text.name: Text
Text.description: Renders scrolling or static text on the model
Text.intent: Display text messages, song lyrics, and countdown numbers

parameters.name: Text_Line1
parameters.description: First line of text to display

parameters.name: Text_Font
parameters.description: Font to use for rendering text

parameters.name: Text_Dir
parameters.description: Text scroll direction

parameters.name: Text_Speed
parameters.description: Speed of text scrolling

parameters.name: Text_YStart
parameters.description: Vertical starting position of the text

analysis_mappings.description: BPM drives text scroll speed for rhythmic movement

Pictures.name: Pictures
Pictures.description: Displays an image file (BMP, PNG, GIF) on the model with movement options
Pictures.intent: Show static images, animated GIFs, or scrolling picture content

parameters.name: Pictures_Filename
parameters.description: Path to the image file to display

parameters.name: Pictures_Direction
parameters.description: Direction of image movement across the model

parameters.name: Pictures_Speed
parameters.description: Speed of image movement

parameters.name: Pictures_FrameRateAdj
parameters.description: Frame rate adjustment for animated GIFs

parameters.name: Pictures_TransparentBlack
parameters.description: Make black pixels transparent

parameters.name: Pictures_StartScale
parameters.description: Starting scale percentage for the image

parameters.name: Pictures_EndScale
parameters.description: Ending scale percentage for the image

analysis_mappings.description: BPM drives image movement speed

Kaleidoscope.name: Kaleidoscope
Kaleidoscope.description: Kaleidoscope mirror effect that reflects content in symmetric patterns
Kaleidoscope.intent: Add visual symmetry and complexity to underlying effects

parameters.name: Kaleidoscope_Type
parameters.description: Kaleidoscope symmetry type

parameters.name: Kaleidoscope_X
parameters.description: Horizontal center position of the kaleidoscope

parameters.name: Kaleidoscope_Y
parameters.description: Vertical center position of the kaleidoscope

parameters.name: Kaleidoscope_Size
parameters.description: Size/scale of the kaleidoscope segments

parameters.name: Kaleidoscope_Rotation
parameters.description: Rotation angle of the kaleidoscope pattern

analysis_mappings.description: BPM drives kaleidoscope rotation for rhythmic symmetry changes
Energy drives segment size for visual complexity
